core_mechanism: extracting an ordered K-theory (K_0) invariant from an operator algebra built on the groupoid of a dynamical system, then reading off a discrete labelling set as the numerical range of that invariant under a trace fixed by an invariant measure
brief_reason: The abstract builds a C*-algebra from the translation groupoid of a tiling and uses its scaled ordered K_0-group, evaluated by a state given by an invariant measure on the hull, to label the spectral gaps.
